app.update_banner: An update is available. Open Settings → About to install.

identity_gate.subtitle: first launch · no identity yet
identity_gate.description: PhantomChat needs a cryptographic identity before it can send or receive. Click below to generate one — view, spend and signing keys are stored locally in your application data directory.

step1.subtitle: first launch · setup wizard
step1.description: End-to-end encrypted messenger with stealth-tag scanning, double-ratchet sessions and PQXDH-hybrid envelopes. We will guide you through identity, relays and address sharing — about a minute of clicking.

step2.generate_description: Generates fresh view, spend, signing and identity keys. Stored locally in your platform's application data directory.
step2.restore_description: Paste the contents of an exported keys.json below. Required fields: view/spend/signing/identity (private + public).
step2.ready_message: identity ready · click Next to continue

step3.description: PhantomChat publishes envelopes to one or more Nostr relays. Pick the defaults you trust and / or add a custom one.
step3.pick_at_least_one: please pick at least one relay

step4.description: Have your contact scan this QR or copy the raw address — both encode the same phantom:view:spend payload. Safe to publish: it contains no secrets.

step5.description: Pick the look that fits your environment. You can switch any time later in Settings → Appearance.
step5.hint: Soft Light and Corporate disable the CRT scanlines and glitch effects.

step6.description: You are ready to chat. The listener will start on your configured relays and you will be able to add contacts from the main panel.

lan.description: If your colleagues are already running PhantomChat on the same network, paste the 6-digit org code they shared with you. We'll auto-discover them in the background.
lan.share_with_colleagues: Share this code with your colleagues during their onboarding. They'll paste it into the same step on their machines.
lan.skipped_message: skipped — you can join later via Settings → LAN Org.
lan.warning: Caution: only use this on trusted office networks. mDNS broadcasts your address to all devices on the LAN. Don't enable on public Wi-Fi (cafés, hotels, conferences).

identity.title: identity
identity.display_name_hint: This name is shown to people you invite to MLS groups (in the welcome wrapper). For 1:1 chats it is only used in your own UI.

backup.title: backup & restore
backup.intro: Export an encrypted snapshot of your identity, contacts, sessions and messages. Required by §147 AO / GoBD for tax-related communication (10-year retention).
backup.import_warning: ⚠ Your current identity, contacts and messages will be OVERWRITTEN with the backup contents. This cannot be undone.
backup.passphrase_too_short: passphrase must be at least 12 characters
backup.strength_entropy: {{bits}} bits of entropy · est. crack time: {{time}}
backup.strength_hint: Recommendation: at least 16 characters OR a 6-word diceware passphrase. NOTE: if you lose the passphrase, the backup is unrecoverable.

theme.title: appearance
theme.description: Choose the visual style that fits your environment. The CRT scanlines and glitch effects only appear in the Cyberpunk theme.
theme.cyberpunk_hint: Dark CRT-inspired theme with neon-green and magenta accents (default).
theme.light_hint: Bright background with soft pastel accents — professional look for most environments.
theme.corporate_hint: Near-monochrome neutral palette with a single cobalt accent — ideal for screenshots and presentations.

diagnostics.title: diagnostics
diagnostics.optin_hint: Default: off. When on, the "Send" button below uploads a single crash report at a time over HTTPS.
diagnostics.privacy_note: Reports are sent over HTTPS to updates.dc-infosec.de. We only read the crash data — no message content, no identity, no contacts.

danger.title: danger zone
danger.description: Wipe all local data: identity, contacts, sessions, messages and MLS state. The app closes immediately afterwards.

lan.title: lan org
lan.description: Zero-touch peer discovery for office LANs. Anyone running PhantomChat on the same network with the same 6-character org code is auto-added as a contact.
lan.warning: Caution: only use this on trusted office networks. mDNS broadcasts your address to all devices on the LAN. Don't enable on public Wi-Fi (cafés, hotels, conferences).

contacts_pane.unbound_pending_hint: click to bind to a contact
contacts_pane.empty: (no contacts — click "+ new" to add one)
contacts_pane.unbound_badge_title: No sealed-sender pubkey bound — incoming sealed messages appear as ?<hex> until you bind

status.title: status
status.ram_only_hint: MLS group state is RAM-only · directory persists

create.title: start a group
create.created: group created — you are the sole member

message_stream.empty: (waiting for first message — type below or wait for incoming)
message_stream.tampered_title: Signature failed — sender attribution was tampered with. Do not trust the label.
message_stream.hash_mismatch_title: Hash mismatch — DO NOT OPEN. The file's SHA-256 does not match the manifest.
message_stream.open_folder_title: Open Downloads/PhantomChat in your file manager
message_stream.image_open_title: Open {{filename}} in your default image viewer

reply.toolbar_title: Quote this message in your reply

disappearing.label: auto-disappear
disappearing.active_title: Disappearing messages: rows expire {{secs}}s after sending
disappearing.row_title: This message will auto-purge once the timer reaches zero

archive.unarchive_title: Move conversation back to the contact list

settings_archive.title: Archive
settings_archive.description: Conversations you archived from the contact list. Click a label to restore it.
settings_archive.clear_all_confirm: Permanently remove all archived conversations from the contact book? This cannot be undone.

input_bar.attach_title: Attach a file to send to {{label}} (max 5 MiB)
input_bar.attach_title_no_contact: Select a contact to attach a file

bind_modal.title: bind unknown sender
bind_modal.description: Pick the contact this sealed-sender pubkey belongs to. Future messages from this key will resolve to that contact's name.
bind_modal.empty: (no contacts — add one first, then re-open this modal)
bind_modal.rebind_warning_title: Warning: this contact already has a bound key — clicking will overwrite it.

address_qr.aria: Your PhantomChat address as a QR code
